description_long: This house features a single-story structure with a blue metal gable roof and white exterior walls. The front includes a covered porch with a tiled floor, supported by simple posts, and a main entry door flanked by two windows. The windows are symmetrically arranged with wooden frames and shutters, and the house is accompanied by a large clay water jar and a simple wooden fence. A satellite dish is mounted on the roof, indicating modern amenities. The roof extends over the porch, providing shade and shelter, while the overall design is practical and unadorned. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, metal, and wood, with a utilitarian and rural architectural style.
description: A single-story house with a blue gable roof, white walls, a covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a satellite dish, accompanied by a clay jar and wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, covered porch, two front windows, clay jar, and wooden fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, three windows, the satellite dish, and the porch extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall, roof structure, and the clay jar positioned at the corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with three windows, the clay jar, and the wooden fence more visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a covered porch, tiled floor, and no decorative elements
